info.title: PetChain API
info.description: REST API for PetChain — secure pet health records, medication reminders, QR scanning, appointments, payments, and blockchain-verified medical records.

tags.name: Medical Records
tags.description: Veterinary medical records with optional blockchain verification

BearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from /auth/login. In development, use mock-{userId} format.

error.message: Authentication required. Please provide a Bearer token.
name, species, and ownerId are required

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or ID

get.description: OWNER must supply their own ownerId. VET and ADMIN can list all.

post.description: OWNER can only create pets for themselves. ADMIN can create for any owner.

get.summary: Get all pets for a specific owner

get.description: Public endpoint — no authentication required. Accepts raw pet ID or petchain QR URL.

parameters.name: qrCode
parameters.description: URL-encoded QR code value or pet ID

get.summary: Get medical records for a pet (nested route)

get.description: OWNER must supply petId for one of their pets.

get.summary: Get all medical records for a pet

get.description: OWNER must supply petId. VET defaults to their own appointments.

put.summary: Update appointment (Owner, assigned Vet, or Admin)

get.description: OWNER must supply petId for one of their pets.

frequency.description: once_daily | twice_daily | three_times_daily | every_other_day | weekly | as_needed

200.description: Subscription will be cancelled at period end

post.description: FUTURE FEATURE — payment processing is stubbed.

400.description: Payment already processed or invalid state

get.summary: Get payment history for current user

timestamp.description: Unix ms timestamp; defaults to server time

schema.description: Any JSON object representing the user data snapshot

title.example: Tips for giving pills to cats

body.example: Hide the pill in a treat...

example.title: Tips for giving pills to cats
example.body: Hide the pill in a treat or use a pill pocket.

post.summary: Bulk import pets from CSV (Vet or Admin)
post.description: Upload raw CSV text. Required columns: name, species, ownerId. Optional: breed, dateOfBirth (YYYY-MM-DD), microchipId.

201.description: Import complete (at least one row imported)
